title: Agent-Driven NL Assembly
summary: Reshape M05 from a planned Python FastAPI embeddings + LLM enrichment service into an agent-driven intelligence layer. The agent's own model provides all semantic reasoning; the system provides storage, structured recording tools (record_decision, save_context_pack with metadata fields), full-text search (LIKE-based, recency-ordered), and two new read tools (list_context_packs, read_context_pack). The bridge auto-saves a structured digest as a fallback floor; agent-authored Context Packs are canonical. Five compliance mechanisms (manifest reframes, trigger contract, SessionStart contract reminder, mid-session reminder, dashboard coverage stat) target ~80% canonical coverage. SessionStart auto-injects recent decisions to close the cross-developer awareness gap. Removes sqlite-vec, pgvector, summary_embedding column, EMBEDDING_DIM constant, and all M05-as-service references.
supersedes: Original M05 plan (Python FastAPI + sentence-transformers + Ollama/Gemini enrichment service)
